ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (M/F) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the student (e.g., 9th, 12th) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "reading_score" INTEGER /* Score received by the student in reading */,
  "math_score" INTEGER /* Score received by the student in math */,
  "pass_math" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student passed math */,
  "pass_reading" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student passed reading */,
  "pass_both" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student passed both subjects */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the student's parents or guardians */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the student */,
  "special_needs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student has special educational needs */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* Type of the school (e.g., District, Private) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school principal */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students in the school */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students in the school */,
  "pass_rate_math" REAL /* Pass rate for math as a percentage */,
  "pass_rate_reading" REAL /* Pass rate for reading as a percentage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for the metrics */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students included in the metrics */,
  "median_reading_score" REAL /* Median reading score of students in the school */,
  "median_math_score" REAL /* Median math score of students in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational district */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the district */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools within the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the district office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the district office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the district office */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "superintendent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the district superintendent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., 9th, 10th) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Typical age range for students in the grade */,
  "expected_reading_level" TEXT /* Expected reading level for the grade */,
  "expected_math_level" TEXT /* Expected math level for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student associated with the performance record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric associated with the record */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was assessed */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who conducted the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the student's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_performance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student involved in the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., tutoring, counseling) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention program */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher responsible for the intervention */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or observations about the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the intervention (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., District, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school performance metric */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students in the school */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students in the school */,
  "pass_rate_math" REAL /* Pass rate for math as a percentage */,
  "pass_rate_reading" REAL /* Pass rate for reading as a percentage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for the metrics */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students included in the metrics */,
  "median_reading_score" REAL /* Median reading score of students in the school */,
  "median_math_score" REAL /* Median math score of students in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
